modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Coyote Cash account not charged for a transaction

full_description_text: I tried to make a purchase using my Coyote Cash, but it seems my account wasn't charged. I was off campus at a vendor when this happened. It's confusing because I expected the transaction to go through without any issues.

description: I tried to make a purchase using my Coyote Cash, but it seems my account wasn't charged. I was off campus at a vendor when this happened. It's confusing because I expected the transaction to go through without any issues.
